_doc: Maintainable list of special-styled chapter blocks that have NO self-evident markup. Keys are chapter numbers; each entry tags the paragraph run from `from`..`to` (inclusive) with a CSS class family `<type>`/`<type>-top`/`<type>-bot`, styled in assets/css/main.css. Anchors match a paragraph's PLAIN TEXT (tags + entities decoded), smallest valid span wins. `node devScripts/import-gdoc.mjs` re-validates anchors after an import and warns on misses. Most special blocks are AUTO-detected and need NO entry here: lore/system boxes (===/--- delimited), `[ ... ]` system messages (+ italic = announcement), business `card` (━━━ delimited), `terminal` (₩/※ shop runs), `options` (numbered lists), `panel` (MIN MAX gauge). Only list types with no signal: idcard, chat, note.

1.from: -Is it true Kim Soleum turned down a girl he liked because he was too scared to watch the horror movie she wanted to see?

14.from: -Did you guys see the official notice that just went up?
14.to: -Is Kim Soleum the one who wore that weird mask with horns…?

20.to: Later, plush dolls made by recycling the clothing and bones of said individuals were discovered in the souvenir shop. (Presumed deceased)
